learn.core_idea: Locality windows reduce misses when working sets fit available cache/frame capacity.
mechanism_steps: Identify hot pages in short interval.
Allocate enough capacity to retain hot set.
learn.worked_example: Increasing frames/TLB entries can preserve hot-set translations and lower faults.
common_mistakes: Tuning multiple knobs without measuring impact.
Confusing locality gain with random variation.
pre_challenge_checklist: I can identify hot access subset.
I can choose one tuning change at a time.
